consumptionDesc: Send warning message when points are consumed
departmentStrategyDesc: Controlled departments and their sub-departments will use the current strategy. Uncontrolled departments will use the 'Organization Control' strategy (team creators are not subject to control strategies, while other super administrators will be normally included in control)
memberMaxPoints: Maximum Monthly Points Consumption per Member
memberStrategyDesc: Controlled members will use the current strategy. Uncontrolled members will first match department strategy then organization strategy (team creators are not subject to control strategies, while other super administrators will be normally included in control)
organizationMaxPoints: Maximum Monthly Points Consumption for Organization
organizationStrategyDesc: Control strategy for the entire team. If no other control strategies are matched, this strategy will be used uniformly (team creators are not subject to control strategies, while other super administrators will be normally included in control)
